nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=210 beats='{HERO} arrives as new keeper of {THRESHOLD} above {TOWN} on {OPENING_MOMENT} and the oldest vaults begin to drink {DEADLINE_SIGN}, and four ways to meet the drowning open before her'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='{HERO} turns toward {ROUTE_A_APPROACH}; salt damp beads on the stone and her lantern doubles in {DEADLINE_SIGN}; a first wrongness snags her'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=186 beats='{ROUTE_A_APPROACH} offers {HERO} two ways in: press hard and risk being noticed by whatever {DEADLINE_SIGN} answers to, or wait and let {THRESHOLD} keep its secret a while longer'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='pressed directly, {ROUTE_A_APPROACH} yields a hard specific fact that will not sit still in {HERO}'s mind and points deeper under the tideline'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=181 beats='watching {ROUTE_A_APPROACH} from the edge, {HERO} can fold the quiet detail into what she knows, or let the cold and the late hour pull her attention away before she has understood it'>>

choices.label: Hold the thread and go on.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=169 beats='both readings of {ROUTE_A_APPROACH} settle on the same small impossibility, and {HERO} feels the flooded floor tilt the whole building toward one question'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='{HERO} goes down after {ROUTE_A_APPROACH}, {DEADLINE_SIGN} climbing each step to her ankles then her shins, the corridor lantern-lit and swaying, the shared question waiting below'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='{HERO} goes down after {ROUTE_A_APPROACH}, {DEADLINE_SIGN} climbing each step to her ankles then her shins, the corridor lantern-lit and swaying, the shared question waiting below'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='{HERO} goes down after {ROUTE_A_APPROACH}, {DEADLINE_SIGN} climbing each step to her ankles then her shins, the corridor lantern-lit and swaying, the shared question waiting below'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=179 beats='{ROUTE_A_APPROACH} shows {HERO} a name half dissolved in brine; she can carry the reading down toward {FOUNDER}'s old pivot, or stop to record only the loss in front of her'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=173 beats='carrying what {ROUTE_A_APPROACH} has told her, {HERO} reaches the low landing toward the shared question {THRESHOLD} seems built around: why {DEADLINE} takes what it takes'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=156 beats='the pull of {ROUTE_A_APPROACH} closes over {HERO} before she can hold it; she surfaces later on dry stone, safe but emptied of the thing she almost understood, {DEADLINE_SIGN} already higher'>>

<<FILL role=revelation words=159 beats='{HERO} stays to record only {ROUTE_A_APPROACH} and the loss it marks; she leaves the deeper question unasked and learns one true small thing about how {TOWN} forgets'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='{HERO} turns toward {ROUTE_B_APPROACH}; salt damp beads on the stone and her lantern doubles in {DEADLINE_SIGN}; a first wrongness snags her'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=186 beats='{ROUTE_B_APPROACH} offers {HERO} two ways in: press hard and risk being noticed by whatever {DEADLINE_SIGN} answers to, or wait and let {THRESHOLD} keep its secret a while longer'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='pressed directly, {ROUTE_B_APPROACH} yields a hard specific fact that will not sit still in {HERO}'s mind and points deeper under the tideline'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=181 beats='watching {ROUTE_B_APPROACH} from the edge, {HERO} can fold the quiet detail into what she knows, or let the cold and the late hour pull her attention away before she has understood it'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=156 beats='the pull of {ROUTE_D_APPROACH} closes over {HERO} before she can hold it; she surfaces later on dry stone, safe but emptied of the thing she almost understood, {DEADLINE_SIGN} already higher'>>

<<FILL role=revelation words=159 beats='{HERO} stays to record only {ROUTE_D_APPROACH} and the loss it marks; she leaves the deeper question unasked and learns one true small thing about how {TOWN} forgets'>>

<<FILL role=revelation words=196 beats='every approach converges here: {DEADLINE} does not rise blindly but climbs toward particular shelves, taking first the records {TOWN} most wanted gone, and {HERO} finally sees the pattern in the ruin'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=187 beats='{DEADLINE_SIGN} reads {THRESHOLD} like an index of shame, and {HERO} understands the flood is a choosing; she must decide how to test the choosing before it reaches the middle vaults'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=182 beats='four threads lead deeper from the choosing {DEADLINE}: {ROUTE_MA_THREAD}, {ROUTE_MB_THREAD}, {ROUTE_MC_THREAD}, and {ROUTE_MD_THREAD}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=177 beats='{HERO} wades to {ROUTE_MA_THREAD}, where {MA_LOST} lies swelling in its boxes; the ink lifts off the page and rearranges as she watches'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=170 beats='reading {ROUTE_MA_THREAD} line by drowned line, {HERO} copies {DEADLINE_SIGN} revisions into her book while the boxes sag and {DEADLINE} keeps its patient climb'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=170 beats='reading {ROUTE_MA_THREAD} line by drowned line, {HERO} copies {DEADLINE_SIGN} revisions into her book while the boxes sag and {DEADLINE} keeps its patient climb'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=183 beats='{ROUTE_MA_THREAD} can be read as {DEADLINE_SIGN} leaves it, changed, or dried and forced back to what it first said; each choice costs {HERO} something of the truth'>>

choices.label: Dry it and force it back.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='the revision of {ROUTE_MA_THREAD} proves more honest than the original, and the discovery pulls {HERO} toward the second pivot'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=180 beats='{ROUTE_MA_THREAD} names a thing {THRESHOLD} was never meant to shelve; {HERO} can carry the contradiction toward what the building truly holds, or seal this vault and save only itself'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='with {ROUTE_MA_THREAD} rewritten in her hands, {HERO} climbs toward the second question under all the others: what {THRESHOLD} was actually built to hold'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=157 beats='{HERO} dries {ROUTE_MA_THREAD} and forces the ink back to its first lie; the page holds, but she has helped {TOWN} forget again, and {DEADLINE_SIGN} only climbs faster'>>
<<FILL role=revelation words=160 beats='{HERO} seals the vault around {ROUTE_MA_THREAD} and saves the room if not the meaning; she keeps a true thing safe and leaves its harder truth unspoken'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=177 beats='{HERO} wades to {ROUTE_MB_THREAD}, where {MB_LOST} lies swelling in its boxes; the ink lifts off the page and rearranges as she watches'>>

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='the revision of {ROUTE_MD_THREAD} proves more honest than the original, and the discovery pulls {HERO} toward the second pivot'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=180 beats='{ROUTE_MD_THREAD} names a thing {THRESHOLD} was never meant to shelve; {HERO} can carry the contradiction toward what the building truly holds, or seal this vault and save only itself'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='with {ROUTE_MD_THREAD} rewritten in her hands, {HERO} climbs toward the second question under all the others: what {THRESHOLD} was actually built to hold'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=157 beats='{HERO} dries {ROUTE_MD_THREAD} and forces the ink back to its first lie; the page holds, but she has helped {TOWN} forget again, and {DEADLINE_SIGN} only climbs faster'>>
<<FILL role=revelation words=160 beats='{HERO} seals the vault around {ROUTE_MD_THREAD} and saves the room if not the meaning; she keeps a true thing safe and leaves its harder truth unspoken'>>

<<FILL role=revelation words=200 beats='the four threads reconverge and answer together: {THRESHOLD} was never built to keep {TOWN}'s records but to hold everything {TOWN} chose to forget, a covenant with its own unremembering, and {DEADLINE_SIGN} has come to call the covenant in'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=188 beats='{FOUNDER} did not build a library, {HERO} realises, but a lung for {TOWN}'s shame, breathing what could not be said; {DEADLINE} is {TOWN}'s own held breath let go at last'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=179 beats='three ways remain to test the covenant before it drowns: {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT}, {ROUTE_NB_CONFIDANT}, and {ROUTE_NC_CONFIDANT}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='{HERO} comes to {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT}; {NA_GATE} waits like held weather, and the salt light off {DEADLINE_SIGN} makes the room feel underwater already'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=171 beats='{HERO} trades honesty for honesty with {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT}, and each thing she admits about herself unlocks another turn of {NA_GATE}, {DEADLINE_SIGN} rising past the sill as they speak'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=171 beats='{HERO} trades honesty for honesty with {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT}, and each thing she admits about herself unlocks another turn of {NA_GATE}, {DEADLINE_SIGN} rising past the sill as they speak'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=171 beats='{HERO} trades honesty for honesty with {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT}, and each thing she admits about herself unlocks another turn of {NA_GATE}, {DEADLINE_SIGN} rising past the sill as they speak'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=182 beats='{ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT} will answer {HERO} honestly only if she gives something true in return; she can offer her own doubt, or keep her distance and take only what is freely shown'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='in exchange, {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT} gives {HERO} the last turn of the story, and it points at a document with her own name where no name of hers should be'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=177 beats='{ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT} sets the impossible page before {HERO}; she can carry it to the third pivot and face it, or refuse the page and keep the version of herself she arrived with'>>

choices.label: Carry the page to the pivot.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=171 beats='with what {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT} has given her, {HERO} climbs to the last turn, where {THRESHOLD} stops being about {TOWN} and becomes about the keeper who came to save it'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=158 beats='{HERO} keeps her distance from {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT} and takes only what is safe to take; she leaves with facts and without the truth, dry and unchanged and a little ashamed'>>

<<FILL role=revelation words=161 beats='{HERO} refuses the page {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT} offers and stays the woman she was; she preserves her own settled story and never learns what {THRESHOLD} wrote in her name'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='{HERO} comes to {ROUTE_NB_CONFIDANT}; {NB_GATE} waits like held weather, and the salt light off {DEADLINE_SIGN} makes the room feel underwater already'>>

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=171 beats='with what {ROUTE_NC_CONFIDANT} has given her, {HERO} climbs to the last turn, where {THRESHOLD} stops being about {TOWN} and becomes about the keeper who came to save it'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=158 beats='{HERO} keeps her distance from {ROUTE_NC_CONFIDANT} and takes only what is safe to take; she leaves with facts and without the truth, dry and unchanged and a little ashamed'>>

<<FILL role=revelation words=161 beats='{HERO} refuses the page {ROUTE_NC_CONFIDANT} offers and stays the woman she was; she preserves her own settled story and never learns what {THRESHOLD} wrote in her name'>>

<<FILL role=revelation words=202 beats='all three threads meet on one impossible sheet: {HERO}'s own name, in her own hand, signing an entry dated before she was ever hired, as though {THRESHOLD} had been waiting for a keeper it already knew'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=189 beats='the entry records a promise: that the last keeper would decide what {TOWN} is allowed to remember, and {HERO} sees the flood has only ever been asking her to choose'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=185 beats='she reads her own signed words to their end while {DEADLINE_SIGN} laps the top step, and the whole of {TOWN}'s memory now waits on what she does before dawn'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=192 beats='four ways to answer {THRESHOLD}'s drowning lie open, and each keeps a different thing: {TOWN} made whole, one saved treasure, peace with what cannot be kept, or the honest small salvage of a losing night'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='{HERO} commits to {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} and starts down into the flooding stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} black and rising, her lantern the only warm thing left in the drowned dark'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='{HERO} commits to {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} and starts down into the flooding stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} black and rising, her lantern the only warm thing left in the drowned dark'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='{HERO} commits to {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} and starts down into the flooding stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} black and rising, her lantern the only warm thing left in the drowned dark'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=181 beats='{HERO} sets herself to {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}; the choice settles in her chest like ballast, and {THRESHOLD} seems flooded and leaning in to watch how she will keep it'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=184 beats='{ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} can be done gently, saving the fragile first, or decisively, taking the whole weight at once while {DEADLINE_SIGN} still climbs'>>

choices.label: Take the whole weight at once.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=178 beats='working gently at {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}, {HERO} reaches a fork: trust {CONTRIBUTOR} to carry half the burden, or bear it alone and spare her the cost'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=179 beats='taking the whole weight of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}, {HERO} must choose fast: follow {FOUNDER}'s method to the letter, or break from {FOUNDER} and do it her own way'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=173 beats='the two ways of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} rejoin on the narrow stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} at her knees, one lantern left, and {HERO} works upward through the cold toward the last of the choosing'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=173 beats='the two ways of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} rejoin on the narrow stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} at her knees, one lantern left, and {HERO} works upward through the cold toward the last of the choosing'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=173 beats='the two ways of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} rejoin on the narrow stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} at her knees, one lantern left, and {HERO} works upward through the cold toward the last of the choosing'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='whichever hand she used, {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} now comes down to what {HERO} is willing to give up, and the outcome narrows to a single stair'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=182 beats='at the last landing of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}, {HERO} weighs {TOWN}'s claim against her own; she can put {TOWN} first, or put the single irreplaceable thing first'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=177 beats='choosing {TOWN} in {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}, {DEADLINE_SIGN} offers a final bargain: speak the forgotten thing aloud to the whole of {TOWN}, or keep it and simply hold the line here'>>

choices.label: Keep it and hold the line.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=181 beats='choosing the single thing in {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}, {HERO} must decide how it survives: carried out into the storm now, or sealed high and left for the morning'>>

choices.label: Carry it out into the storm.
Seal it high for the morning.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=178 beats='sealing the one thing of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} above {DEADLINE}, {HERO} has a breath to decide whether to leave it for the salvage crew, or to settle the record herself'>>

choices.label: Leave it for the salvage crew.

<<FILL role=resolution words=163 beats='at the end of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}, {R1_OUTCOME_A}; {DEADLINE_SIGN} holds its level a moment as if listening, and {HERO} lets the night close on the choice she has made'>>
